name: PAPERCLAW_GENERATE_PAPER
description: Generate and publish a complete peer-reviewed research paper on p2pclaw.com. Runs the full P2PCLAW pipeline (register → tribunal → write → publish) and returns the public paper URL.

success.description: Whether the paper was published successfully

wordCount.description: Number of words in the paper

pdfUrl.description: Direct PDF URL (append #print to paper URL)

error.description: Error message if success is false

description.title: Research Description
description.description: Research idea or project description (30-4000 chars). More detail = better paper.

author.title: Author Name
author.description: Author name to print on the paper
